name: Pecan Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread 1 cup of shelled pecans on a cookie sheet and roast in a preheated oven at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Coarsely chop half of the roasted pecans and reserve them for garnish.
3. Put the remaining pecans, 1/4 cup of unsalted butter, 1/2 teaspoon of lemon juice, and 1 teaspoon of Worcestershire sauce in a blender or food processor container.
4. Blend until very smooth.
